\textbf{Clearwater State University} | 2017--2021\\
Honors Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering\\
\textit{Minor in Statistics}\\
\textit{Minor in Mathematics}
\begin{itemize}
\item GPA: 3.8/4.0 Summa Cum Laude
\item Full Merit Scholarship Awarded
\item Electrical and Computer Engineering Honors Scholar
\end{itemize}%
